Thanks for the PR!  Please fill out each section.  Items that don't
apply can be marked N/A — empty fields will slow down review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullets describing what changed and why. -->

-

## Linked issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123", "Refs #456" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires `MIGRATION.md` entry)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Test plan

<!-- How you verified this works.  Include commands + outcomes. -->

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -q` passes locally
- [ ] Added / updated tests for new behaviour
- [ ] Manually verified on at least one deployment mode (state which one)

## Risk + rollback

<!--
What could go wrong, and how would we roll back?
Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to?
-->

## Docs / changelog

- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `docs/*` for user-visible changes
- [ ] Updated `MIGRATION.md` for breaking changes

## AI contributors

<!-- Skip this section if you're a human contributor. -->

- [ ] Commit message includes a `Co-Authored-By:` trailer naming the
      agent + the human operator who reviewed the diff
- [ ] No prohibited paths touched (LICENSE, SECURITY.md,
      CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md without explicit human sign-off)
- [ ] Human operator has reviewed the full diff before requesting review
